title: Rodent Proofing in Union, NJ | $500-$3,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional rodent proofing services in Union, New Jersey. Protect your home or business from mice and rats. Expert exclusion work from $500-$3,000. Call today!
intro: Union, New Jersey residents and businesses face ongoing challenges with rodent infestations, particularly as colder months drive mice and rats indoors. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive rodent proofing services throughout Union, sealing entry points and protecting your property from future invasions. Our expert technicians provide customized solutions ranging from $500 to $3,000 depending on property size and infestation severity.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Union and the greater New Jersey-NYC area with proven rodent exclusion techniques. Our licensed technicians use commercial-grade materials and offer guaranteed results, ensuring your Union property remains rodent-free year-round.
localContext: Union's mix of historic homes along Colonial Avenue, modern townhouses near Kean University, and commercial properties along Route 22 each present unique rodent entry vulnerabilities. Our team understands the specific challenges of Union's diverse architecture, from older residential foundations to busy retail spaces at Union Center, providing tailored rodent proofing solutions for every property type.

faqs.question: What does rodent proofing include in Union, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our rodent proofing service includes a thorough inspection of your Union property, sealing all entry points with steel wool and caulking, installing door sweeps, covering vents with mesh screens, and addressing gaps around pipes and utilities. We also provide recommendations for reducing attractants and ongoing prevention strategies specific to your property.

faqs.question: Why does rodent proofing cost between $500 and $3,000?
faqs.answer: The cost varies based on your property size, the number of entry points discovered, and the extent of exclusion work required. A small Union apartment may need basic sealing ($500-$800), while larger homes or commercial buildings requiring extensive foundation work, crawl space barriers, and roof line protection can reach $2,000-$3,000.

faqs.question: How long does rodent proofing last in Union homes?
faqs.answer: Professional rodent proofing typically lasts 5-10 years when properly maintained. Union's seasonal weather patterns and building settling can create new gaps over time, which is why we recommend annual inspections. Our materials are designed to withstand New Jersey winters and resist rodent gnawing for maximum longevity.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees for rodent proofing in Union?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a comprehensive warranty on all rodent proofing work in Union. If rodents re-enter through areas we've sealed within the warranty period, we'll return to address the issue at no additional charge. We also offer ongoing maintenance plans to ensure your property remains protected long-term.
